title: Shallow Learning vs. Deeper Approaches
description: A flowchart contrasting the simplified concept of 'Shallow Learning' (like a single perceptron) with the multi-layer structure of Deep Learning and the feedback loop of Reinforcement Learning, highlighting the progression in complexity.
elements: Reinforcement Learning (Agent, Environment, Reward Feedback Loop)
relationships: Shallow Learning transforms input directly to output
Deep Learning stacks multiple layers for hierarchical feature learning
Reinforcement Learning uses a continuous loop of action, state, and reward to learn optimal behavior
